cases.name: cache-fast-path
cases.prompt: Prep this project; a fresh .ks/context.json exists from yesterday and nothing material changed.
expected_behavior: Prints the cached Development Context with a freshness note instead of re-deriving
Still runs hygiene: pull, stray-state, drift check, gate

cases.name: gate-derived-from-ci
cases.prompt: Prep a repo whose CI workflow runs system tests and bundler-audit.
expected_behavior: Reports the derived QUALITY_GATE including system tests
Lists bundler-audit under advisory AUDIT_CHECKS, not the blocking gate
